relationships: ber:Yanni yella yettεawan Skura mi ara d-yeffeɣ seg uɣerbaz
ber:Sami yella yekṛeh ad yeqqim deg uɣerbaz mi ara fakent tezrawin
ber:Sami ilaq ad d-yas mi ara d-yeffeɣ seg uɣerbaz
ber:Tom iḥemmel ad d-yernu seg ddemma-nnes mi ara yessawal ɣef kra
ber:D ayen yessewhamen mi ara iẓer yiwen dakken asawal n Sami rxis
ber:Ula d yiwen ur as-igir tamawt i wursu-nni mi d-yeffeɣ
ber:D ayen yessewhamen mi ara nẓer dakken imedɣan deg yiḍ i ttilin d urmiden
ber:Tturareɣ aṭas tacirḍart mi ara d-ffɣeɣ seg uɣerbaz
ber:Qrib dima tturareɣ takurt n uqecwal mi ara d-ffɣeɣ seg uɣerbaz
ber:Yewwi lantrit mi yesɛa xemsa u settin n yiseggasen
